title: Зв'язки між таблицями
starter_code:
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base, Session, relationship

Base = declarative_base()

class Author(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'authors'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(50))
    books = relationship('Book', back_populates='author')

class Book(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'books'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    title = Column(String(100))
    author_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('authors.id'))
    author = relationship('Author', back_populates='books')

engine = create_engine('sqlite:///:memory:')
Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

with Session(engine) as s:
    author = Author(name='Шевченко')
    author.books.extend([
        Book(title='Кобзар'),
        Book(title='Заповіт')
    ])
    s.add(author)
    s.commit()

    a = s.query(Author).first()
    print(f'{a.name}: {len(a.books)} книг')
    for book in a.books:
        print(f'  - {book.title}')

tests.input: from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, ForeignKey; from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base; B=declarative_base(); print('ok')

explanation: Зв'язки дозволяють зручно переходити між пов'язаними таблицями.
one_liner: relationship() зв'язує моделі, ForeignKey вказує на таблицю
